generated.title: Fix intermittent timeout issue in payment service
generated.description:
## Summary
Investigate and resolve intermittent timeout errors occurring in the payment processing service under high load conditions.

## Details
The issue appears when concurrent requests exceed threshold limits.
generated.valueStatement: As a platform reliability engineer, we want stable payment processing so that users experience seamless transactions.
acceptanceCriteria: Timeout errors reduced by at least 90% under load testing
No regression in existing payment workflows
Monitoring alerts configured for latency spikes
tasks: Analyze logs to identify root cause
Implement retry mechanism with exponential backoff
Conduct load testing in staging environment
assumptions: Load testing environment mimics production traffic patterns
Database indexes can be modified without downtime
dependencies: Coordination with DevOps for load testing setup
questions: What is the acceptable latency threshold for payment processing?
Should we introduce circuit breaker pattern?
